positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial forest scene rendered in deep indigo, gold, and burnt orange. The composition features large, sweeping bioluminescent trees with highly contrasted, clean silhouettes. Small, geometric planets and glowing crystalline orbs orbit a central nexus point. The style is highly detailed, neo-art deco fantasy, optimized for fabric printing, emphasizing strong graphical separation between elements. Flat graphic depth with subtle gradient gradients, perfect for central apparel placement. Dreamlike, maximalist yet clean composition. Minimal noise.
